  |  Entry Point  |

          +-----+
+---------------o---+
|  Core Logic   |   |
|         v-----+   |
|  +-------------+  |
|  |  Process A  |  |
|  +------+------+  |
|         |         |
|         v         |
|  +-------------+  |
|  |  Process B  |  |
|  +------+------+  |
|         |         |
+---------o---------+
          v
  +--------------+
  |  Exit Point  |
  +--------------+
